# Harrat Uwayrid

**Summary**: A volcanic field in the northwestern part of Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] studied xenoliths from the Harrat Uwayrid area.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] Related to the opening of the Red Sea system

## Formations Present

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] harrat-uwayrid

## Key Findings From This Location

- Located between Tabuk and Al Ula, containing peridotite xenoliths in both old and young host rocks. ([[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023, p. 21]])
